title: agrostis canina var. pusilla
intro: Agrostis canina var. pusilla, also known as Small Cotton-Grass or Dwarf Red Fescue, is a perennial grass species native to northern Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Agrostis canina var. pusilla include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
